sections.paragraph:
Original: תּמא תּימא

Transliteration: têymâ' têmâ'

Phonetic: tay-maw'

BDB Definition:

Tema = "desert"
  1. the 9th son of Ishmael (noun proper masculine)
  2. the land settled by Tema the son of Ishmael (noun proper locative)

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
